programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Country rocker Andy Ross wants Danny to build the world's most patriotic muscle car ever made. Will a Second Amendment-inspired hot rod Corvette do the trick? Meanwhile, Roli blackmails Horny Mike into teaching him how to airbrush.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny lets painter Ryan take the lead on a 1959 Chevy Panel Truck project he hopes to flip, and later motivates his crew to clean up the shop with an inter-departmental build competition.

programme.title: Bush Wreck Rescue
programme.desc: Glen and Bill lay their hopes of salvaging the build-off on a rusty old panel van, while competitor Robin pulls out all the stops to retrieve parts for his milk truck.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike tracks down a rare, rally bred Italian import, a 1972 Lancia Fulvia. To bring the coupe back to its former glory, he and Ant will need to correct bad CV joints and a debris-clogged fuel system.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Sharpening Steels, Bladder Pumps, Ironing Boards, and Kayak Paddles
programme.desc: Explores the ins and outs of the making of sharpening steels, bladder pumps, ironing boards and kayak paddles.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Champagne Hoods, Pneumatic Delivery, Espresso Machines, and Pizza Ovens
programme.desc: An investigation into how champagne hoods and foils, pneumatic delivery systems, espresso machines, and pizza ovens are made.

programme.title: Drive TV - Launch Pad
programme.desc: Jess Lydka-Morris explores Sydney in the new IM electric vehicle, highlighting cutting-edge innovation, premium design, and the future of intelligent driving.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett make a tank for hip-hop artist Tyga. To mark his hit single Rack City, they seek to fill a tank with cash. Will Tyga feel like a million bucks?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike tracks down a rare, rally bred Italian import, a 1972 Lancia Fulvia. To bring the coupe back to its former glory, he and Ant will need to correct bad CV joints and a debris-clogged fuel system.

programme.title: Gold Rush Special
programme.desc: With no paycheck for five weeks, Todd Hoffman's close-knit team turn on each other. Parker's gamble to run his washplant without protection from rocks proves costly. Tony builds a $10,000 mega-trailer to move his barge but gets his measurements wrong.

programme.title: Alaska Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Following success at Fairbanks, the women return to Gold Run, where a power struggle erupts between SJ and John over mining locations.

programme.title: Opal Hunters: Red Dirt Road Trip
programme.desc: JC travels west to meet with his mentor and black opal specialist, Rod Manning, on a secret mission. Rod hopes he's uncovered a forgotten opal field.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers World Tour
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis offer their expertise to petrol head and YouTuber Freddy, aka Tavarish, on his ambitious McLaren P1 build.

programme.title: Gold Rush Special
programme.desc: With no paycheck for five weeks, Todd Hoffman's close-knit team turn on each other. Parker's gamble to run his washplant without protection from rocks proves costly. Tony builds a $10,000 mega-trailer to move his barge but gets his measurements wrong.

programme.title: Alaska Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Following success at Fairbanks, the women return to Gold Run, where a power struggle erupts between SJ and John over mining locations.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: Perhaps the greatest unexplained mystery of all is: what happens to us after we die? Perhaps clues to the answer lie in unusual cases of near-death experience, reincarnation, and how memories can be passed from organ donors to transplant recipients. Are these phenomena figments of our collective imagination, or could they be real?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike tracks down a rare, rally bred Italian import, a 1972 Lancia Fulvia. To bring the coupe back to its former glory, he and Ant will need to correct bad CV joints and a debris-clogged fuel system.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Sharpening Steels, Bladder Pumps, Ironing Boards, and Kayak Paddles
programme.desc: Explores the ins and outs of the making of sharpening steels, bladder pumps, ironing boards and kayak paddles.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Champagne Hoods, Pneumatic Delivery, Espresso Machines, and Pizza Ovens
programme.desc: An investigation into how champagne hoods and foils, pneumatic delivery systems, espresso machines, and pizza ovens are made.

programme.title: Drive TV - Launch Pad
programme.desc: Jess Lydka-Morris explores Sydney in the new IM electric vehicle, highlighting cutting-edge innovation, premium design, and the future of intelligent driving.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett make a tank for hip-hop artist Tyga. To mark his hit single Rack City, they seek to fill a tank with cash. Will Tyga feel like a million bucks?

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Stile & Rail Doors, Steam Cleaners, Hand-Held Pizzas, and Power Brushes
programme.desc: An investigation into how stile and rail doors, steam cleaners, hand-held pizza, and power brushes are made.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Industrial Casters, Wedding Cakes, THz Spectrometers, and Racing Catamarans
programme.desc: An investigation into how industrial casters, wedding cakes, tetrahertz spectrometers and racing catamarans are made.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant drag a rare 1972 Datsun 510 two-door into the 21st century. The engine is in good order, and the car itself could be quite valuable, but the paint job is awful and the gearbox is unresponsive.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: DJ Steve Aoki wants an aquarium that features a three-headed dragon about to escape from the tank.

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: The Chevelle makes it through paint and into the assembly area, where it comes back to life. New upholstery gives the car the real upgrade it needs, and just like that, Dave is the hero of the family again.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers World Tour
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis offer their expertise to petrol head and YouTuber Freddy, aka Tavarish, on his ambitious McLaren P1 build.

programme.title: Gold Rush Special
programme.desc: With no paycheck for five weeks, Todd Hoffman's close-knit team turn on each other. Parker's gamble to run his washplant without protection from rocks proves costly. Tony builds a $10,000 mega-trailer to move his barge but gets his measurements wrong.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant drag a rare 1972 Datsun 510 two-door into the 21st century. The engine is in good order, and the car itself could be quite valuable, but the paint job is awful and the gearbox is unresponsive.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Stile & Rail Doors, Steam Cleaners, Hand-Held Pizzas, and Power Brushes
programme.desc: An investigation into how stile and rail doors, steam cleaners, hand-held pizza, and power brushes are made.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Industrial Casters, Wedding Cakes, THz Spectrometers, and Racing Catamarans
programme.desc: An investigation into how industrial casters, wedding cakes, tetrahertz spectrometers and racing catamarans are made.

programme.title: Drive TV - Drive Car Of The Year
programme.desc: Jess Lydka-Morris embarks on a scenic adventure to Jervis Bay, NSW, behind the wheel of the all-new Kia Carnival Hybrid. She seeks out hidden gems and off-the-beaten-track experiences, exploring how this family favourite has evolved.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: DJ Steve Aoki wants an aquarium that features a three-headed dragon about to escape from the tank.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant drag a rare 1972 Datsun 510 two-door into the 21st century. The engine is in good order, and the car itself could be quite valuable, but the paint job is awful and the gearbox is unresponsive.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: Even after centuries of study, the human mind remains as inscrutable as ever. Could the quintessential human machine, the brain, be even more powerful than we realize? And does that suggest that fantastic abilities such as Remote Viewing will one day be recognized not as science fiction, but as science fact ? even if, for the moment, they remain UnXplained?

programme.title: History's Most Shocking
programme.desc: Tony analyzes shocking moments: a man crashing his plane for fame, giant snakes falling from a roof, cyclists nearly crushed, and the 1971 Soviet jet crash at the Paris Air Show.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II
programme.desc: John drills into the mountain as a WWII artifact confirms military presence. A grim discovery in the tunnel risks everything, while Bingo finds a lead on Yamashita's lost gold.

programme.title: Days That Shaped America: Waco Siege
programme.desc: The 1993 siege on the Branch Davidian compound in Waco, Texas, is the deadliest single event in the history of the ATF; includes interviews with FBI agents, a reporter, a law enforcement officer, the coroner, and others.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: Even after centuries of study, the human mind remains as inscrutable as ever. Could the quintessential human machine, the brain, be even more powerful than we realize? And does that suggest that fantastic abilities such as Remote Viewing will one day be recognized not as science fiction, but as science fact ? even if, for the moment, they remain UnXplained?

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There: Bermuda Triangle Edition
programme.desc: Tony Harris visits the Florida coast to hunt for UFOs and wormholes in the Bermuda Triangle. Alongside his team, he analyses viral evidence and similar global phenomena to determine what's fact and what's fiction.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant drag a rare 1972 Datsun 510 two-door into the 21st century. The engine is in good order, and the car itself could be quite valuable, but the paint job is awful and the gearbox is unresponsive.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Stile & Rail Doors, Steam Cleaners, Hand-Held Pizzas, and Power Brushes
programme.desc: An investigation into how stile and rail doors, steam cleaners, hand-held pizza, and power brushes are made.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Industrial Casters, Wedding Cakes, THz Spectrometers, and Racing Catamarans
programme.desc: An investigation into how industrial casters, wedding cakes, tetrahertz spectrometers and racing catamarans are made.

programme.title: Drive TV - Drive Car Of The Year
programme.desc: Jess Lydka-Morris embarks on a scenic adventure to Jervis Bay, NSW, behind the wheel of the all-new Kia Carnival Hybrid. She seeks out hidden gems and off-the-beaten-track experiences, exploring how this family favourite has evolved.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: DJ Steve Aoki wants an aquarium that features a three-headed dragon about to escape from the tank.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Ceramic Grills, Pneumatic Punchers, Water Jet Fountains, Wooden Surfboards
programme.desc: Find out how ceramic grills, punching machines, jet fountains, and hollow wooden surfboards are made.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Vibrating Mining Screens, Whoopie Pies, Utility Poles, and Roller Conveyors
programme.desc: An insight into how vibrating mining screens, whoopie pies, wood utility poles and roller conveyors are made.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike tracks down one of only 1000 MC40s ever produced, the 40th anniversary homage to the Monte Carlo rally-winning British icon. Ant tackles the dreaded 100,000 mile service.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: NBA all-star Paul George wants two identical fish tanks next to his indoor pond, and he hopes the job can be finished by the time he returns from the Olympics in Rio.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Country rocker Andy Ross wants Danny to build the world's most patriotic muscle car ever made. Will a Second Amendment-inspired hot rod Corvette do the trick? Meanwhile, Roli blackmails Horny Mike into teaching him how to airbrush.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny lets painter Ryan take the lead on a 1959 Chevy Panel Truck project he hopes to flip, and later motivates his crew to clean up the shop with an inter-departmental build competition.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: Chuck receives a map supposedly leading to a hidden cache of recovered materials from the Roswell incident. He and his team go on an epic treasure to find them.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: Oakland Poltergeist, King Tut's Alien Jewel and Cursed Castle
programme.desc: Don investigates a sinister haunting at a California mansion, an ancient Egyptian relic that some believe is from beyond the stars.
